human_actions_pending.action: Run 5 human UAT browser tests from .planning/phases/06/06-VERIFICATION.md
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 06 is 100% verified at code level. Human tests cover: (1) incomplete session display in history, (2) background transition smoothness, (3) compact landscape layout in DevTools device emulation, (4) app version in info panel footer, (5) regression across all features in landscape viewport.

decisions.rationale: cycleCount initializes to 1; increments only after all 4 phases complete — so >= 2 means at least 1 full cycle done
CSS custom property --bg changes don't animate on background-color; background shorthand catches them

decisions.decision: height: auto + min-height: 100vh in compact landscape body
decisions.rationale: Overrides base height: 100vh so content can expand past viewport while preserving full-height layout when short

decisions.decision: APP_VERSION JS-injected at init, not hardcoded in HTML
decisions.rationale: CONFIG constant is single source of truth; HTML element starts empty

decisions.decision: Stop renamed to Pause in UI.btnStop
decisions.rationale: Session is paused not ended; Resume/Start appears after — 'Pause' reflects actual behavior

next_action: Run 5 human UAT browser tests from .planning/phases/06/06-VERIFICATION.md, then /gsd-ship or /gsd-complete-milestone
context_notes: Phase 06 is complete at code level. RELEASES.md was updated this session with the full v1.0.0 changelog (Added: incomplete session tracking + APP_VERSION display; Changed: Stop→Pause; Fixed: body transition + compact landscape height). Only thing remaining is human UAT confirmation before shipping v1.0.
